相图本质是一种参数空间分布图，它是研究物态的重要工具。我们对天体性质的探索和对物质性质的探索一样，是在探索天体在参数空间中的分布，这本质上就是在绘制天体的“相图”……钱磊 - 科学网博客

Netflix’s new documentary Dance Dreams follows actor-choreographer-director-producer Debbie Allen and her students at the Debbie Allen Dance Academy as they prepare for their annual performance of Hot Chocolate Nutcracker, a modern take on the Christmas ballet standby.
